name: Restaurant menu and order setup
pitchTone: Practical and hospitality-aware. Keep menu accuracy, hours, allergens, and order handoff safer than flashy design.
valuePropHook: A menu and order setup that makes hours, current items, takeout steps, and customer handoff clear without inventing prices or availability.

serviceOffer.headline: Restaurant menu and order setup
serviceOffer.customerOutcome: Guests can see current menu information and take the correct ordering step without digging through old photos.

packages.name: Menu/order setup
packages.description: Menu page, hours, takeout CTA, order handoff copy, and QA.

vendorRequirements: POS or order provider verified before integration
